answer: If I could offer a piece of wisdom about life, it would be to keep your perspective clear, much like a shimmering surface reflecting the world around you. Just as a well-crafted window frames a breathtaking view, choose to focus on what brings joy and meaning to your journey. Allow your experiences to flow through you, like light passing through glass, illuminating the paths ahead. Remember, sometimes the best view comes from stepping back and letting the world shine in.
